data.title: 国际服例行维护41
data.summary: [6/27 Scheduled Maintenance Notice] Sensei, we will be undergoing a scheduled maintenance on 6/27 (T
data.body:
[6/27 Scheduled Maintenance Notice]

Sensei, we will be undergoing a scheduled maintenance on 6/27 (Tue).

🗓️Maintenance Period: 6/27 (Tue) 2:00 – 9:00 AM (UTC)
➡️Details: https://forum.nexon.com/bluearchive-en/board_view?board=3217&thread=2174528

※ Maintenance hours are subject to change.

[Extended Maintenance Notice]

6/27(Tue) Maintenance has been extended, Sensei.
Maintenance is now due to end at 12:00 PM (UTC).

Additional notices will be provided if there are further delays.
We apologize for the inconvenience.
